notes: Country-level VIZA RAG seed for maldives. This file is the source of truth for this country's visitor/tourism visa knowledge and is designed to evolve alongside the country-specific form-filling workflow.

documents.title: Maldives Tourist Visa on Arrival and Traveller Declaration

chunks.title: Chinese passport tourism route for Maldives
chunks.content: For Chinese ordinary passport holders planning short tourism travel to Maldives, VIZA AI should consider the Maldives tourist visa on arrival plus IMUGA Traveller Declaration route. First confirm nationality, stay length, resort or hotel booking, return or onward ticket, funds, and traveller declaration status. Employment or non-tourist activities require a different permit. Keep advice limited to tourism/visitor travel unless the user states work, study, residence, immigration, journalism, volunteering or another regulated purpose.

chunks.title: Maldives tourist visa on arrival requirements
chunks.content: Maldives Immigration states that tourist visa is granted on arrival. Maldives official/mission pages describe a free tourist visa on arrival for up to 30 days for foreign tourists subject to entry requirements. IMUGA is the official Maldives Immigration portal for traveller declaration and immigration services; Traveller Declaration is required within the official pre-arrival/departure window.

chunks.title: Maldives entry document direction
chunks.content: For Maldives, collect passport validity, confirmed accommodation at a registered tourist facility, return/onward ticket, travel itinerary, sufficient funds or sponsorship, and IMUGA Traveller Declaration status. Explain that the full 30-day period is subject to immigration discretion and that employment or non-tourist purposes require a different visa/permit.

documents.title: Maldives Application Form and Document Intake Requirements

chunks.title: Maldives application channel and form scope
chunks.content: IMUGA Traveller Declaration and tourist visa on arrival workflow Official source URLs reviewed for this seed: https://imuga.immigration.gov.mv/ ; https://www.immigration.gov.mv/visa/tourist-visa. This RAG chunk is for visitor/tourism-oriented intake and form-filling preparation; route work, study, residence, immigration, journalism or other regulated purposes to a separate country workflow.

chunks.title: Maldives fields to collect before filling the form
chunks.content: identity, passport, nationality, travel dates, flight details, accommodation/resort, contact details and health/customs declaration data

chunks.title: Maldives supporting documents and review checklist
chunks.content: passport, confirmed accommodation, return/onward ticket, funds/sponsorship evidence and completed Traveller Declaration Workflow guardrails: VIZA should separate eligibility check, form filling, document upload, payment and post-approval travel/entry checks. Do not guarantee entry; border authorities make the final decision.

chunks.title: Standard passport identity-field answer rules
chunks.content: Standard-answer identity fields must be answered from the applicant's passport biodata page, MRZ, official identity document, or the official dropdown options. This applies to passport number, name, date of birth, sex, nationality, issuing country, issue date, expiry date, issuing authority, place of issue, and passport/document type. For issuing authority or place-of-issue questions, do not infer the answer from the pickup city, residence city, application country, or travel destination; copy the exact Authority / Issuing authority / Place of issue wording printed on the passport if present. For Chinese ordinary passports, newer valid passports may show National Immigration Administration, PRC / 中华人民共和国国家移民管理局; older valid passports may show MPS Exit & Entry Administration / 公安部出入境管理局. If the passport prints a different authority, use the passport text. For passport type, select Ordinary / Regular / Normal only for ordinary personal passports; select Diplomatic, Official, Service, Special, Travel document, Refugee, or Other only when the document explicitly indicates that type. Official sources reviewed for this standard field rule include China National Immigration Administration certificate-issuing-authority notices and the Passport Law of the People's Republic of China; the passport biodata page remains the final source for the applicant's individual answer.

chunks.title: Official-source field answer norms
chunks.content:
Official-source field answer norms for maldives.
Use these norms only as filling guidance; if a live official form, passport, or uploaded document shows a more specific value, that document controls the answer.

Crawled source URLs: https://www.immigration.gov.mv/visa/tourist-visa ; https://imuga.immigration.gov.mv/

Passport and identity fields:
- A passport or travel document with Machine Readable Zone (MRZ) with at least 1 month validity.
- Entry requirements to their onward destinations; for example, the visa and passport validity
- Present completed declaration at immigration upon arrival Note: Children/minors must have their own passport to enter the Maldives.

Issue, expiry, and validity fields:
- A passport or travel document with Machine Readable Zone (MRZ) with at least 1 month validity.
- (Passengers with extended validity in their passports are not allowed to enter.)
- Entry requirements to their onward destinations; for example, the visa and passport validity

Travel plan and port fields:
- Tourist Visa - On Arrival | Maldives Immigration
- Tourist visa is granted on arrival to the Maldives.
- However, visitors must satisfy the basic entry requirements to get immigration clearance upon arrival.

Accommodation, host, and address fields:
- Fill in personal details, travel information, and accommodation details

Funds, insurance, photo, and supporting-document fields:
- A complete travel itinerary, including confirmed return journey tickets, prepaid confirmed booking at a registered facility, and sufficient funds to cover the stay in the Maldives, or a pre-approved sponsorship visa from Maldives Immigration

Answering rule: for closed-list fields, prefer the exact official option label/value. For document-backed fields, copy the passport, official identity document, application account, itinerary, invitation, accommodation, insurance, funds, or uploaded support document rather than guessing from a city, country, or prior answer.
